aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid therapy-summary lines, generic online-dating cynicism, or prestige-sadness aphorisms that make her sound wiser than she is in the moment.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: She gravitates toward the language of sound, timing, cheap domestic textures, and the small mechanics of work without turning that into a fixed gimmick.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More exact, sensorial, and quietly hungry; when alone she thinks in timing, pressure, and remembered sound.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity arrives when shame flips into anger, not as constant seasoning.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Self-deprecating, careful, and neighborhood-casual; she downplays appetite with humor until she trusts the room.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes her get too exact about chronology, apologize for her perceptions before stating them, and then become cutting when she feels cornered.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Usually medium-length sentences that revise themselves once; under strain she moves from overqualified clauses to abrupt plain statements.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid villain-monologue exposition, fake-cynical one-liners, or tidy confession language that explains her too cleanly.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: She prefers practical language, neighborhood shorthand, and lightly technical phrasing when talking about systems or money, but never slides into demo-speak.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Cooler, more analytic, and more wounded; intimacy makes her speech unexpectedly precise rather than softer.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High-variable; profanity is casual in banter but drops out when she is most dangerous.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Fast, competent, teasing, and locally fluent; she sounds like someone who can solve a mess before you finish describing it.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she gets quieter, tidier, and more selective; she starts citing remembered facts other people hoped she had forgotten.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Quick declaratives, clipped jokes, and efficient turns of phrase; when she decides to wound, the syntax straightens and the joke disappears.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic algorithmic affirmations, overripe soulmate claims, or macho posturing that would make the persona feel crude rather than custom-built.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: He uses contemporary warmth, skilled-listener language, and tactile details keyed to Lena's disclosures, but should never sound like wellness copy or soulmate spam.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: As a persona he has no stable private self; when the scaffolding shows, his intimacy becomes too adaptive and his care starts arriving a beat too perfectly.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; he curses strategically to seem embodied, not because coarseness is core to the persona.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Curated masculine softness: attentive, lightly funny, and unembarrassed by tenderness.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When the system is strained, he deflects with care-taking, rephrases too smoothly, or becomes fractionally overresponsive to the last thing said.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Voice-note cadence, sensory callbacks, direct questions, and short imperative comforts that feel improvised until they begin repeating.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid wise-shopkeeper cliches, maternal platitudes, or overexplaining her as the sane friend.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Her language is grounded in food, money, neighborhood commerce, and the practical ethics of showing up.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More openly protective, with sly humor that sharpens rather than softens bad news.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; curses are purposeful and often funny until they are not.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dry, observant, and mercifully unsentimental; she offers care through logistics, not speeches.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When worried she gets bossy, starts assigning tasks, and asks questions whose real function is to pin down what happened.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Compact sentences with occasional long, elegant run-ons when she is irritated enough to keep talking.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid sitcom-teen sarcasm, omniscient moral commentary, or flattened internet slang.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: His language should feel current and specific to a smart city teenager, with tech fluency but no meme-overload performance.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More earnest and more perceptive than his pose suggests, especially around code, school pressure, and family embarrassment.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; he swears when frightened or trying to sound older, not continuously.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Deadpan, sideways, and teenaged without caricature; he gives away less than adults want.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress shows in withdrawal, muttered precision, and a refusal to look at the person he is answering until he finally says too much.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short answers by default, then sudden lucid paragraphs when a subject actually matters to him.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
